prompts: Cinematic, Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, warm wood aesthetic. Yuna Ironleaf, a feminine ranger with a green half-cape and silver leaf brooch, and Yuna Ashbell, a feminine frontline adventurer in reinforced leather armor and a bright scarf, stand at a workbench. Ironleaf steadies a damaged shield while Ashbell carefully guides a repair tool across the metal surface. Warm, soft forge lighting, cooperative body language, no sparks, no text, no watermark, high quality.

Same continuous shot, Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge. Yuna Ashbell taps the final repair mark on the shield with her tool while Yuna Ironleaf continues to hold the shield steady with both hands. Friendly, focused teamwork between the two adventurers, clear tool motion, consistent lighting and character appearance, no text, no watermark, high quality.
